calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-03-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Carla Amador & Sajja Ravinantapricha, CSR: Arlene Howell (Department 218)

Appearances:
Petitioner/Parent, Ling Pho, is appearing in propia persona on behalf of the minor child, Jonan Chiu.

This matter comes on calendar this day for an Order to Show Cause hearing re Change of Name of a minor. Ling Pho is sworn and examined by the Court.

The matter having been submitted and no objections having been made to the change of name of the Minors at the hearing, it appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the minors to: JONAN ZHI XIAN PHO. Decree is submitted and signed in open court.
